review.rationale: Bulk differential expression emits the ranked gene table used by enrichment.
Gene identifier mapping emits the count matrix used by bulk differential expression.
Variant calling emits the CSV variant table consumed by variant annotation.
VCF operations emits a filtered VCF accepted by the phasing skill.
Differential analysis emits the feature results accepted by pathway enrichment.
Normalization emits the feature matrix used by differential analysis.
Normalization emits the feature matrix used by statistical analysis.
XCMS preprocessing emits the peak table accepted by normalization.
Differential abundance emits the ranked protein results used by enrichment.
Identification emits the peptide table used for protein quantification.
Quantification emits the protein abundance matrix used for differential abundance.
The producer writes X_pca and the consumer declares X_pca as a hard input precondition.
sc-preprocessing explicitly guarantees processing_state=preprocessed for scrna output.
Spatial preprocessing preserves obsm.spatial and the domain detector requires those coordinates.
Spatial preprocessing writes X_pca and integration declares that representation as required.
The registration skill documentation explicitly names preprocessing as its upstream stage.
Spatial preprocessing writes X_pca and trajectory declares that representation as required.
Raw spatial processing writes obsm.spatial consumed by the foundational preprocessing stage.
